You'll need to know what MCP is! 🚀 (Part 5 of becoming an AI-first engineer series)

Model Context Protocol (MCP) is the bridge connecting AI models with external tools that's transforming how engineers build AI applications:

🧠 What is MCP? 
• An open protocol that standardizes how LLMs interact with external tools and data 
• Allows AI agents to call functions through APIs – locally or remotely over servers 
• Think of traditional APIs as waiters (requiring specific orders) vs MCP as a personal assistant that intuitively knows what you need

💻 Quick MCP example in the video: 
• Built with Python MCP server
• Creates a simple function that LLMs can call through natural language requests 
• Demonstrates how an LLM recognizes when to use the function based on user input

🛠️ Why MCP matters for AI engineers: 
• Connect your AI agents to hundreds of existing MCP servers 
• Build agents that can fetch data, make updates, and interact with various tools 
• Integrate with Amazon Bedrock and other LLM platforms to create powerful AI solutions

Have you heard of MCP before? Let us know in the comments if you're already using this protocol in your projects! 👇

Learn about running MCP on AWS via link in bio 🔗

Follow @awsdevelopers for more cloud content.

The truth?
Most people will never build what they dream about.

Not because they’re lazy.
Not because they’re stupid.
Because they’re slow.

The second you have an idea, you’re racing against the clock.
Against other founders. Against the market. Against your own doubt.

And 99% of people lose that race before they even realize they’re in it.

The game was rigged against them... until Famous.ai rewrote the rules.

It’s not "another AI tool."
It’s not "no-code for beginners."
It’s not "pretty templates with no soul."

It’s a weapon.
A full-stack, database-backed, revenue-ready, launch-in-hours weapon.

It builds it, for real.

Frontend. Backend. Auth. Billing. Admin Panels.
The invisible work that normally kills dreams before they ever launch? Gone. Done. Handled.

It doesn’t just vomit code like the other tools.

It plans. It engineers. It makes decisions the way a grizzled CTO would.

It protects you from mistakes you don’t even know you're about to make.

It builds things you didn’t even realize you needed until you see it, and wonder how you ever lived without it.

While everyone else is stuck googling “how to add payments” you’re deploying.

While they’re arguing over API documentation — you’re closing customers.

One click. Live. Yours.

No rented platforms. No invisible locks.

Every pixel, every function, every keystroke; belongs to you.

And by the time they realize what’s happening?
You're already three releases ahead.
Already in front of their customers.
Already famous for the thing they wish they built first.

But here’s the brutal truth nobody wants to admit:
Speed wins.
Period. Full stop. End of story.

Those who move faster... win bigger.
Those who hesitate... disappear quietly.

Famous.ai doesn’t just give you speed.
It gives you an unfair fcking advantage.

Use it right and you don’t just catch up.
You become the one they’re chasing.

(But fair warning... this window won’t stay open forever.)
The ones who figure it out early will dominate.

Everyone else?
They’ll be left wondering how the hell they got left behind.

The next wave of legends isn’t waiting. They’re building.. faster than you think.

The truth?
Most people will never build what they dream about.

Not because they’re lazy.
Not because they’re stupid.
Because they’re slow.

The second you have an idea, you’re racing against the clock.
Against other founders. Against the market. Against your own doubt.

And 99% of people lose that race before they even realize they’re in it.

The game was rigged against them... until Famous.ai rewrote the rules.

It’s not "another AI tool."

A full-stack, database-backed, revenue-ready, launch-in-hours weapon.

While everyone else is stuck googling “how to add payments” you’re deploying.

One click. Live. Yours.

No rented platforms. No invisible locks.

Every pixel, every function, every keystroke; belongs to you.

And by the time they realize what’s happening?
You're already three releases ahead.
Already in front of their customers.
Already famous for the thing they wish they built first.

But here’s the brutal truth nobody wants to admit:
Speed wins.
Period. Full stop. End of story.

Those who move faster... win bigger.
Those who hesitate... disappear quietly.

Famous.ai doesn’t just give you speed.
It gives you an unfair fcking advantage.

Use it right and you don’t just catch up.
You become the one they’re chasing.

The ones who figure it out early will dominate.

Everyone else?
They’ll be left wondering how the hell they got left behind.

The next wave of legends isn’t waiting. They’re building.. faster than you think.

DON’T JUST STUDY IT.

Artificial Intelligence (AI) – ISC | Classes XI & XII

The world is run by algorithms.
The future will be led by those who understand them.

At St. Joan’s School, Artificial Intelligence is not an add-on.
It is a rigorous, forward-looking ISC subject designed for students who want to think, build, and lead in tomorrow’s world.

⸻

🤖 WHY STUDY AI IN SCHOOL?

Because AI is no longer optional.

AI powers:
 • Medicine & Biotechnology
 • Robotics & Automation
 • Finance & Data Science
 • Climate & Sustainability
 • Space, Defence & Smart Cities

Starting AI in Class XI–XII gives students a massive head-start before university.

⸻

📘 WHAT MAKES THIS PROGRAMME EXCEPTIONAL?

🔹 ISC-Aligned, Academically Rigorous
 • Board-approved curriculum
 • Strong focus on logic, algorithms, ethics & applications
 • Designed for serious academic learners

🔹 Hands-on, Not Just Theory
 • Coding & problem-solving
 • AI models, datasets & real-world simulations
 • Exposure to Robotics & Computational Thinking

🔹 University & Career Advantage
 • Ideal foundation for:
 • Engineering
 • Computer Science
 • Data Science
 • AI & Robotics
 • Strong portfolio for Indian & international universities

🔹 Ethics, Responsibility & Innovation
 • Understanding AI ethics, bias & responsible use
 • Creating technology that serves humanity

⸻

🌍 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

✔ Students with curiosity for technology
✔ Logical thinkers & problem-solvers
✔ Aspiring engineers, innovators & researchers
✔ Students preparing for a technology-driven future

No prior coding experience required — curiosity and commitment matter more.

⸻

⭐ LIMITED SEATS | SELECTIVE ADMISSION

Admission through:
 • Academic performance
 • Aptitude assessment
 • Interaction / interview

This programme is not mass-market.
It is designed for students who want to stand out.

⸻

🎓 STUDY AI. THINK GLOBALLY. LEAD CONFIDENTLY.

Artificial Intelligence – ISC (Classes XI & XII)
📍 St. Joan’s School

📞 Admissions Open for 2026–27

Yet only 15% of international schools teach AI literacy across all grades.
